message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first replay Player playback in ft replay (tick 278)

Migrates 2 ambient `Player::play_simple` call sites in the `ft replay`
CLI dispatch to the cx-first sibling `play_simple_with_cx`:

- L30683 JSON-output path (`--json`): player plays to CollectorSink,
  collecting all output + events for structured serialization.
- L30728 stdout-output path (default): player plays to StdoutSink,
  streaming replay output to the terminal.

Both paths resolve cx via `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)`
at the call site. The `_with_cx` variant on `Player` (replay.rs L736)
threads cx through the frame iteration loop so a cx-cancel during
playback cleanly aborts mid-replay (respecting playback speed + seek
state) rather than running out the full recording duration.

Replay sessions can be long (multi-hour agent sessions), so cx-cancel
propagation here is particularly meaningful — a Ctrl-C or timeout
during `ft replay` now aborts immediately at the next frame boundary.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 92 (187-278).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 167 sites (165 before + 2).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
